🗺️ CHOOSE MAP

⚔️ CHOOSE MODE

🎯 FREE FOR ALL
No teams — everyone for themselves. Last mech standing wins!
8 players
🤝 TEAMS
You + teammates (🟦) vs the enemy team (🟥). Wipe them out!
3 v 3
👹 BOSS FIGHT
Team up with a squad vs ONE GIANT mega-boss with a massive health bar!
You + 3 allies
🌊 SURVIVAL
You + your squad vs 10 waves that keep getting harder — waves 5 and 10 bring a BOSS!
You + 3 allies
🔫 GUN GAME
Every kill upgrades your gun! Everyone respawns — first to get a kill with ALL 12 guns wins!
6 players
🗼 TOWER CLIMB
Climb floor by floor — each one has more enemies. Every 10th floor is a BOSS that drops a forever-power! Go solo, or bring 1–3 helpers who climb with you.
Solo (just you)
🧟 ZOMBIE HORDE
ALONE against endless waves of fast zombies — tons of them, more every wave, with a giant BRUTE every 5th wave. How long can you last?
👹 BOSS RUSH
ALONE vs boss after boss after boss — each one tougher than the last. You heal between them. How many can you take down?
🚩 CAPTURE THE FLAG
🔵 vs 🔴 — sneak into the enemy base, grab their flag, and run it home! First team to 3 captures wins. Everyone respawns.
4 v 4
⚽ MECH SOCCER
🔵 vs 🔴 — push the ⚽ ball into the enemy goal! First team to 3 wins. Blast each other too — everyone respawns.
3 v 3
🏁 RACE
Blast your rivals AND race through the checkpoints — first mech to the 🏁 finish wins! Knocked out? You restart at your last checkpoint.
6 racers
